rationale.R1.2: The paper contains a fatal internal contradiction regarding the blinding claim and UI instrumentation.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is compromised by the presence of explicit attribution mechanisms (routing badges and survey).
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is violated due to the inconsistent description of the UI and participant experience.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is threatened by the potential for participants to infer backend identity from visible cues.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are compromised by the lack of clear documentation on what each participant could see on each turn.
